series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but not limited to, DHS audit questionnaires, checklists, responses, attachments, and findings associated with audits of the SAIC/STACC's administration of the DHS Classified Security Information (CNSI) Program

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for current, plus two (2) years ; Electronic: Retain for current, plus two (2) years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
